description.brazilian: Entrou no primeiro túnel
description.english: Entered the first tunnel.
description.french: Entrez dans le premier tunnel.
description.german: Du hast den ersten Tunnel betreten.
description.italian: Sei entrata nel primo tunnel.
description.latam: Entraste al primer túnel.
description.spanish: Has entrado en el primer túnel.

description.brazilian: Consertou o poço e recuperou o que estava lá escondido.
description.english: Fixed the well and retrieved what's hidden below.
description.french: Réparez le puits et récupérez ce qu'il s'y cache.
description.german: Du hast den Brunnen repariert und dir geholt, was in seinen Tiefen versteckt war.
description.indonesian: Perbaiki sumur dan ambil sesuatu yang tersembunyi di bawahnya.
description.italian: Hai sistemato il pozzo e recuperato ciò che nascondeva.
description.latam: Arreglaste el pozo y encontraste lo que había escondido.
description.schinese: 修复了古井，并取回了隐藏在下方的东西。
description.spanish: Has arreglado el pozo y encontrado lo que había escondido.
description.turkish: Kuyuyu tamir et ve içinde saklı olanı gün yüzüne çıkar.

description.brazilian: Resolveu seu primeiro desafio
description.english: Solved your first  puzzle.
description.french: Résolvez votre première énigme.
description.german: Löse dein erstes Rätsel.
description.italian: Hai risolto il tuo primo puzzle.
description.latam: Resolviste tu primer puzle.
description.schinese: 解开了你的第一个谜题。
description.spanish: Has resuelto tu primer puzle.

description.brazilian: Complete a coleção
description.english: Complete the collection.
description.french: Complétez la collection.
description.german: Vervollständige die Sammlung.
description.italian: Hai completato la collezione.
description.latam: Completa la colección.
description.spanish: Completa la colección.

description.brazilian: Deu sua proteção a mulher chorona
description.english: Gave your protection to the crying woman.
description.french: Offrez votre protection à la femme qui pleure.
description.german: Beschütze die weinende Frau.
description.indonesian: Berikan kalung pelindungmu kepada wanita menangis.
description.italian: Hai donato la tua protezione alla donna piangente.
description.latam: Le has dado tu protección a la mujer que lloraba.
description.schinese: 将你的护身之物交给了哭泣的女人。
description.spanish: Le has dado tu protección a la mujer que lloraba.

description.brazilian: Recusou a entregar seu colar de proteção a mulher chorona
description.english: Refused to give your protection necklace to the crying woman.
description.french: Refusez de donner votre collier de protection à la femme qui pleure.
description.german: Verweigere der weinenden Frau die schützende Halskette.
description.indonesian: Tolak memberikan kalung pelindungmu kepada wanita menangis.
description.italian: Hai rifiutato di donare il tuo ciondolo protettivo alla donna piangente.
description.latam: Te negaste a darle tu collar de protección a la mujer que lloraba.
description.schinese: 拒绝将护身项链交给哭泣的女人。
description.spanish: Te has negado a darle tu collar de protección a la mujer que lloraba.
description.turkish: Ağlayan kadına tılsımlı kolyeyi vermeyi reddet.

description.brazilian: Abriu o segundos túnel
description.english: Opened the second tunnel gate.
description.french: Ouvrez le portail du deuxième tunnel.
description.german: Öffne das Tor zum zweiten Tunnel.
description.italian: Apri il cancello del secondo tunnel.
description.latam: Abriste la reja del segundo túnel.
description.schinese: 打开了第二条隧道的闸门。
description.spanish: Has abierto la verja del segundo túnel.

description.brazilian: Achou o colar de Proteção
description.english: Found the protection necklace.
description.french: Trouvez le collier de protection.
description.german: Finde die schützende Halskette
description.italian: Trova il ciondolo protettivo.
description.latam: Encontraste el collar de protección.
description.spanish: Has encontrado el collar de protección.

description.brazilian: Se liberte do loop interminável
description.english: Broke free from the endless loop.
description.french: Échappez-vous du cercle vicieux.
description.german: Brich aus der Endlosschleife aus.
description.indonesian: Berhasil lolos dari lingkaran tanpa akhir.
description.italian: Ti sei liberata dal loop infinito.
description.latam: Te liberaste del bucle infinito.
description.spanish: Te has liberado del bucle infinito.

description.brazilian: Completou o Jogo
description.english: Completed the game.
description.french: Finissez le jeu.
description.german: Spiel das Spiel durch.
description.italian: Hai completato il gioco.
description.latam: Completaste el juego.
description.spanish: Has completado el juego.

description.brazilian: Começou o Jogo
description.english: Started the Game.
description.french: Commencez à jouer.
description.german: Starte das Spiel.
description.italian: Hai iniziato il Gioco.
description.latam: Empiezaste el juego.
description.spanish: Has empezado el juego.

description.brazilian: Deu a boneca para a mãe de Akira
description.english: Gave the Kokeshi doll to Akira's mother.
description.french: Donnez la poupée à la mère d'Akira.
description.german: Gib Akiras Mutter die Puppe.
description.italian: Hai dato la bambola alla madre di Akira.
description.latam: Le has dado la muñeca a la madre de Akira.
description.schinese: 将娃娃交给了明里的母亲。
description.spanish: Le has dado la muñeca a la madre de Akira.

description.brazilian: Queimou o Manequim
description.english: Burned the mannequin.
description.french: Brûlez le mannequin.
description.german: Verbrenne die Schaufensterpuppe.
description.italian: Hai bruciato il manichino.
description.latam: Has quemado el maniquí.
description.spanish: Has quemado el maniquí.

description.brazilian: Abriu a porta do Segundo túnel e escapou
description.english: Opened the exit door in the second tunnel and escaped.
description.french: Ouvrez la porte de sortie dans le deuxième tunnel et échappez-vous.
description.german: Öffne die Ausgangstür im zweiten Tunnel und entkomme.
description.indonesian: Buka pintu keluar di terowongan kedua dan melarikan diri.
description.italian: Hai aperto la porta d'uscita nel secondo tunnel, fuggendo.
description.latam: Has abierto la puerta del segundo túnel y escapaste.
description.schinese: 打开第二条隧道的出口门并成功逃离。
description.spanish: Has abierto la puerta del segundo túnel y has escapado.
description.turkish: İkinci tünelin kapısını aç ve kaç.

description.brazilian: Escolheu em sua luz, não em sua escuridão
description.english: Chose to die in the light, not her darkness.
description.french: Choisissez de mourir dans la lumière, pas dans l'obscurité.
description.german: Wähle im Licht zu sterben, statt in ihrer Dunkelheit.
description.indonesian: Pilih mati dalam cahaya, bukan dalam kegelapan.
description.italian: Hai scelto di morire nella luce, non nella sua oscurità.
description.latam: Elegiste morir en la luz, no en su oscuridad.
description.schinese: 选择在光明中死去，而不是她的黑暗里。
description.spanish: Has elegido morir en la luz, no en su oscuridad.
description.turkish: Onun karanlığında değil, kendi ışığında ölmeyi seç.

description.brazilian: Retornou a onde tudo começou
description.english: Returned to where it all began.
description.french: Retournez là où tout a commencé.
description.german: Kehre dorthin zurück, wo alles angefangen hat.
description.italian: Sei tornata a dove tutto è iniziato.
description.latam: Regresaste a donde todo empezó.
description.spanish: Has vuelto a donde empezó todo.
description.turkish: Her şeyin başladığı yere geri dön.

description.brazilian: Recebeu a chave para escapar da mãe de Akira
description.english: Received the Mother Key from Akira's mother.
description.french: Recevez la clé de la mère d'Akira pour vous échapper.
description.german: Bekomme den Ausgangsschlüssel von Akiras Mutter.
description.indonesian: Terima kunci pelarian dari ibu Akira.
description.italian: Hai ricevuto la chiave di fuga dalla madre di Akira.
description.latam: Recibiste la llave de escape de la madre de Akira.
description.schinese: 从明里的母亲那里获得了逃生钥匙。
description.spanish: Has recibido la llave de escape de la madre de Akira.

description.brazilian: Escapou do pesadelo de voltou ao acampamento
description.english: Escaped the nightmare and returned to camp.
description.french: Échappez à ce cauchemar et retournez au campement.
description.german: Entkomme dem Alptraum und kehre zum Camp zurück.
description.indonesian: Berhasil keluar dari mimpi buruk dan kembali ke perkemahan.
description.italian: Fuggi dall'incubo e torna all'accampamento.
description.latam: Escapaste de la pesadilla y regresaste al campamento.
description.spanish: Has escapado de la pesadilla y has vuelto al campamento.
description.turkish: Kâbustan kaç ve kamp alanına dön.

description.brazilian: Fez o erro de voltar ao acampamento
description.english: Made the mistake of returning to camp.
description.french: Faites l'erreur de retourner au campement.
description.german: Du hast den Fehler gemacht zum Camp zurückzukehren.
description.indonesian: Melakukan kesalahan dengan kembali ke perkemahan.
description.italian: Hai fatto l'errore di tornare all'accampamento.
description.latam: Cometiste el error de volver al campamento.
description.spanish: Has cometido el error de volver al campamento.

description.brazilian: Não voltou ao acampamento
description.english: Didn't go back to camp.
description.french: Ne retournez pas au campement.
description.german: Kehre nicht zum Camp zurück.
description.italian: Non sei tornata all'accampamento.
description.latam: No regresaste al campamento.
description.spanish: No has vuelto al campamento.

description.brazilian: Completou o Jogo sem salvar uma única vez.
description.english: Completed the game without saving.
description.french: Finissez le jeu sans sauvegarder.
description.german: Spiel das Spiel durch ohne zu speichern.
description.italian: Hai completato il gioco senza salvare.
description.latam: Completaste el juego sin guardar.
description.spanish: Has completado el juego sin guardar.

description.brazilian: Deu seu colar e pagou com sua própria vida
description.english: Gave away your necklace and paid with your life.
description.french: Donnez votre collier et payez le avec votre vie.
description.german: Gib die Halskette weg und bezahle mit deinem Leben.
description.indonesian: Berikan kalungmu dan tebus dengan nyawa.
description.italian: Hai ceduto il tuo pendente e pagato con la tua vita.
description.latam: Entregaste tu collar y pagaste con tu vida.
description.schinese: 交出项链，并为此付出了生命的代价。
description.spanish: Has entregado tu collar y lo has pagado con tu vida.
description.turkish: Kolyeni ver ve bedelini canınla öde.

description.brazilian: Se recusou a se jogar do penhasco
description.english: Refused to jump off the cliff.
description.french: Refusez de sauter de la falaise.
description.german: Verweigere von der Klippe zu springen.
description.italian: Hai rifiutato di buttarti dal dirupo.
description.latam: Te negaste a saltar del acantilado.
description.spanish: Te has negado a saltar por el acantilado.

description.brazilian: Resolveu o quadro e abriu a mala
description.english: Solved the portrait puzzle and opened the briefcase.
description.french: Résolvez l'énigme du portrait et ouvrez la malette.
description.german: Löse das Portrait-Rätsel und öffne den Aktenkoffer.
description.indonesian: Selesaikan teka-teki potret dan buka koper.
description.italian: Hai risolto il puzzle del dipinto e aperto la valigetta.
description.latam: Resolviste el puzle del retrato y abriste el maletín.
description.schinese: 解开肖像谜题并打开了公文箱。
description.spanish: Has resuelto el puzle del retrato y has abierto el maletín.
description.turkish: Portre bulmacasını çöz ve çantayı aç.

description.brazilian: Queimou a boneca e a destituiu
description.english: Destroyed the forest's tormentor.
description.french: Brûlez et détruisez la poupée.
description.german: Verbrenne die Puppe und zerstöre sie.
description.italian: Hai bruciato la bambola e l'hai distrutta.
description.latam: Quemaste la muñeca y la destruiste.
description.schinese: 烧毁了娃娃，彻底消灭了她。
description.spanish: Has quemado la muñeca y la has destruido.
description.turkish: Ahşap bebeği yak ve onu yok et.
